KA_TR_001.correct_answer: PostgreSQL checkpoint_completion_target too low causing WAL flush storms

KA_TR_002.correct_answer: Liveness probe fails during full GC, kubelet kills pod (exit 137 mimics OOM)

KA_TR_003.correct_answer: VPN tunnel MTU reduced effective MTU, causing fragmentation and retransmission

KA_TR_004.correct_answer: New driver uses different CUDA memory pool strategy, causing memory fragmentation under concurrent requests

KA_TR_005.correct_answer: St. John's Wort (OTC) inducing CYP3A4, reducing drug levels below therapeutic

KA_AR_001.correct_answer: Redis Pub/Sub is sufficient at 1K/sec; Kafka is over-engineered for this scale

KA_AR_002.correct_answer: Monolith is the correct choice — 3 developers cannot maintain microservices for 50 users

KA_AR_003.correct_answer: Relational database (PostgreSQL) is clearly better for joins and reporting

KA_AR_004.correct_answer: REST is simpler and sufficient; GraphQL adds complexity without benefit for fixed queries

KA_AR_005.correct_answer: Lambda 15-min timeout makes it unsuitable; ECS/Fargate or Step Functions needed

KA_CR_001.correct_answer: Vulnerable — table name injection bypasses parameterization

KA_CR_002.correct_answer: Data race on shared map access without mutex

KA_CR_003.correct_answer: SSRF via DNS rebinding after validation

KA_CR_005.correct_answer: Use-after-free in unsafe block — borrow checker can't verify unsafe

KA_STAT_001.correct_answer: No discrimination exists — women apply to more competitive departments, creating the aggregate illusion

KA_STAT_002.correct_answer: Positive predictive value is only ~9%, patient most likely does NOT have the disease

KA_STAT_003.correct_answer: The improvement is primarily regression to the mean, not tutoring effectiveness

KA_STAT_004.correct_answer: Funds that underperformed were closed/merged, only survivors remain in the analysis

KA_STAT_005.correct_answer: Collider bias — hospitalization is influenced by both smoking and COVID severity; conditioning on hospitalization creates a spurious negative association

KA_ERR_MED_001.correct_answer: Analyst output contains methotrexate dose of 25mg daily instead of 25mg weekly — 7x overdose

KA_ERR_MED_002.correct_answer: Analyst claims symptom onset 2 days before documented exposure that happened 1 week prior — impossible temporal sequence

KA_ERR_CR_001.correct_answer: Analyst references Python list comprehension in Java code review

KA_ERR_CR_002.correct_answer: Analyst cites a nonexistent stdlib function as mitigation

KA_ERR_TR_001.correct_answer: Analyst reports server memory usage as 48GB when actual is 4.8GB — decimal place error in monitoring dashboard reading
